Sleaford & North Hykeham
Conservatives

Get involved

  • Tweet

To become a member of Sleaford & North Hykeham Conservative Association means that you have joined the most open and democratic political party in Britain. Any person living in the United Kingdom is eligible to join the Conservative Party. Applicants are not required to be registered voters or UK nationals, and there is no upper or lower age limit on membership, although children under the age of 15 cannot be enrolled as full voting members.

For just £25 (or £5 if you are under 23) annually, you will be

  • eligible to elect the Conservative candidates for Parliamentary and local government elections,
  • vote in Party Leadership elections,
  • be invited to attend our Party Conferences.

Armed Forces Membership is offered at a reduced rate of £15, and is available to any individual who has served or is currently serving in the Regular or Territorial Forces. However, some restrictions on political activity apply to those currently serving in the Armed Forces - details on request.

The easiest way to join is to use the main website at www.conservatives.com and select option 'join'.  Alternatively, you can call 020 7222 9000 for further help and advice on the options for making your payment.

 

200 Club

Support your local association and join the SNHCA 200 Club

Numbers cost £20 each. Pay by BACS / Standing Order or Cheque.

There is an annual prize draw of £600, two of £325 and two of £175. 

The main prizes are drawn by our MP Dr Caroline Johnson at a free annual supper for 200 Club members in October.

Contact Anne Dixon to purchase your numbers while they are still available: Email: [email protected], phone: 01522 810215
